issues.title: 产品灵感日报 · 20 个新品

products.name: Bond
products.tagline: The AI to-do list that does itself
products.summaryZh: AI待办清单，自动完成
products.descriptionZh: Bond 是一款面向高管的AI行政助手。它能连接你的工作工具，学习公司的运作方式，将零散的任务转化为自动管理的待办清单，始终清楚你下一步需要做什么。你可以让Bond为你准备下一次会议、起草后续跟进、发送邮件、创建行动项、识别障碍、提示风险，或将任务委派给团队成员。
products.description: Bond is an AI Chief of Staff for executives. It connects to your tools, learns how your company works, and turns scattered tasks into a self-managing to-do list that always knows what you need to do next. You can ask Bond to prepare you for your next meeting, draft a follow-up, send an email, create action items, identify blockers, surface risks, or delegate tasks to team members.

products.name: Asmi AI
products.tagline: AI that handles your personal chores in the real world
products.summaryZh: 处理你现实世界中个人琐事的AI
products.descriptionZh: Asmi每天早上都会给你打电话。你们聊一聊——它就能帮你处理当天的事务。它可以致电服务机构（牙医、美发沙龙、水管工、银行、保险公司）或个人（朋友、同事），协调、预约或解决问题。完成后通过iMessage或WhatsApp通知你。它能够处理IVR语音导航、等待通话，并妥善应对复杂对话。
products.description: Asmi calls you every morning. You talk - it handles the day. It calls services (dentist, salon, plumber, bank, insurance) or people (friends, colleagues) to coordinate, book or resolve things. Updates you on iMessage or WhatsApp when done. It can navigate IVRS, wait on hold and handle complex conversations well.

products.name: Respan Gateway
products.tagline: One AI gateway with built-in observability and evals
products.summaryZh: 一个内置可观测性与评估功能的AI网关
products.descriptionZh: Respan AI Gateway 通过单一端点将您的应用连接到 1000 多个 AI 模型。但路由只是基础。Respan 通过回退、重试、缓存、支出限制、告警以及每次调用的完整追踪，确保生产环境中的 AI 可靠且可控。网关、可观测性、评估、提示管理、监控和成本控制均运行于同一平台，您无需拼凑五种工具来调试生产环境。
products.description: Respan AI Gateway connects your app to 1,000+ AI models through one endpoint. But routing is the easy part. Respan keeps production AI reliable and under control with fallbacks, retries, caching, spend limits, alerts, and full traces for every call. Gateway, observability, evals, prompt management, monitors, and cost controls all run on one platform, so you do not need to stitch together five tools to debug production.

products.name: Terminal Mode by Even Realities
products.tagline: Keep coding agents always in sight
products.summaryZh: 让编码代理始终可见
products.descriptionZh: Even Realities 的 Terminal Mode 可在 Even G2 智能眼镜上开启一个环境终端。当编码代理卡顿时，你能及时察觉：查看哪个代理需要你，给出指示，并在笔记本电脑运行长时间任务时批准关键步骤，从而让 token 最大化用户每次运行获得更多成果，让氛围编程者保持流畅状态。
products.description: Terminal Mode by Even Realities unlocks an ambient terminal on Even G2 smart glasses. When a coding agent stalls, you catch it: see which agent needs you now, give direction, and approve key steps while your laptop runs long tasks, so token-maxers get more from every run and vibe coders stay in flow.

products.name: Slashspace AI
products.tagline: Canvas first AI experience for sustained, complex work
products.summaryZh: Canvas 首个为持续、复杂工作打造的AI体验
products.descriptionZh: 如今的AI原生用户需要在十几个应用间复制粘贴提示词。对于任何有实质意义的工作而言，这种体验都支离破碎。每个新对话框都会将上下文归零。Slashspace通过AI画布解决了这一问题——AI存在于画布上，你可以将多个对话作为节点运行。画布成为上下文空间，所有智能体都能相互可见。画布以文件形式存储在本地电脑中。经过1600名核心用户超过1.5年的共同构建，我们是市场上最成熟的画布型AI。
products.description: An AI native user today copy-pastes prompts across a dozen apps. It's a broken experience for any kind of meaningful work. Every new chat box collapses context to zero. Slashspace solves that with an AI canvas where AI lives on the canvas, and you can run many chats as nodes. The canvas becomes the context space, and all the agents can see each other. Canvas is stored as files on your computer. Built with 1600 power users for over 1.5 years, we're the most mature canvas AI on the market.

products.name: CrustRecruiter
products.tagline: Turn Claude into a recruiter that thinks like you
products.summaryZh: 将Claude变成一位与你思维一致的招聘官
products.descriptionZh: 招聘一半靠判断，一半靠苦力。Claude负责判断——即推理与记忆，而Crustdata通过MCP提供超过8亿份候选人档案和5项招聘技能，这意味着繁琐工作自动运行，你可以在一个聊天界面内实现大规模真正个性化的招聘。
products.description: Recruiting is half judgment, half grunt work. Claude brings the judgment, i.e. the reasoning and the memory, while Crustdata brings 800M+ candidate profiles and 5 recruiting skills via MCP, meaning the manual work runs itself and you get genuinely personalized recruiting at scale, all inside one chat.

products.name: Tabstack Structured Extraction
products.tagline: Extract web data into structured JSON, no scraper required.
products.summaryZh: 将网页数据提取为结构化JSON，无需爬虫工具。
products.descriptionZh: 定义模式，传入URL，即可获得匹配的JSON。Tabstack的extract端点将任意网页转化为结构化输出，无需解析代码，也无需维护LLM调用。generate端点添加AI指令以生成推理答案，而非原始字段。两者均在每次调用中强制执行你的模式，即使页面发生变化。通过effort levels调节速度，使用geo_target定位任意国家。Mozilla支持：你的数据绝不会被出售或用于训练模型。新用户可获10,000免费额度。
products.description: Define a schema, pass a URL, get back JSON that matches. Tabstack's extract endpoint turns any web page into structured output, no parsing code and no LLM call to maintain. generate endpoint adds AI instructions for reasoned answers, not raw fields. Both enforce your schema on every call, even when the page changes. Tune speed with effort levels, target any country with geo_target. Mozilla-backed: your data is never sold or used to train models. 10,000 free credits to start.

products.name: SlimSnap
products.tagline: Your AI doesn't know which button you mean
products.summaryZh: 你的AI不知道你指的是哪个按钮。
products.descriptionZh: AI将你的截图视为像素块，并猜测你指的是哪个按钮。SlimSnap将截图及你的标注转换为结构化JSON：每个元素都包含坐标、ID，且你的箭头指向特定元素。在Sonnet上约700个token，而原始数据为1,568个token。免费Mac应用。Schema和Claude Code技能采用MIT开源协议。完全在设备端运行。
products.description: The AI reads your screenshot as a pixel blob and guesses which button you meant. SlimSnap converts the screenshot plus your annotation into structured JSON: every element has coordinates, an ID, and your arrow points at a specific one. Around 700 tokens vs 1,568 raw on Sonnet. Free Mac app. Schema and Claude Code skill are open MIT. Runs entirely on-device.

products.name: Juno
products.tagline: AI Health Companion for Chronic Illness
products.summaryZh: 慢性病AI健康助手
products.descriptionZh: Juno 帮助慢性病患者减轻症状、发现规律、缩短确诊路径。基于我们的牛津大学研究与 1000 多次患者访谈构建。
products.description: Juno helps people living with chronic illness reduce symptoms, spot patterns, and shorten the path to diagnosis. Built on our Oxford research and 1,000+ patient interviews.

products.name: Nodey
products.tagline: Your n8n command center, now on your phone
products.summaryZh: 你的 n8n 指令中心，现已登陆手机
products.descriptionZh: Nodey 是 n8n 的移动端伴侣。在手机上实时监控工作流、借助 AI 诊断执行失败、通过提示词构建工作流，以及使用 NFC 标签或地理围栏位置触发自动化。
products.description: Nodey is a mobile companion for n8n. Monitor your workflows in real time, diagnose failed executions with AI, build workflows from a prompt, and trigger automations with NFC tags or geofenced locations — all from your phone.

products.name: PixelForge
products.tagline: Turn photos into game assets
products.summaryZh: 将照片转化为游戏素材
products.descriptionZh: 将一张照片转化为可识别的RPG角色，并实现真实行走效果——包含4方向精灵图包（4x4序列图、16帧透明PNG、行走GIF），可直接用于Godot、Unity或网页端。一次性付费5美元，无需注册，无需订阅。由AI生成，代码完成。
products.description: Turn one photo into a recognizable RPG character that actually walks - a 4-direction sprite pack (4x4 sheet, 16 transparent PNG frames, walk GIFs) ready for Godot, Unity, or the web. One-time $5. No account, no subscription. Generated by AI, finished by code.

products.name: Lium AI
products.tagline: AI for Complex Data
products.summaryZh: 复杂数据的人工智能
products.descriptionZh: Lium 是一个协作式 AI 平台，帮助领域专家从杂乱、海量、多模态数据集中获取可靠答案。连接任意格式的 TB 级数据，用自然语言提问，生成知识产物，并将经过验证的分析转化为团队可复用的工作流。Lium 整合了地理空间、能源、航天及其他复杂领域的数据，使过去需要数周工程的工作，如今在一次对话中即可完成。
products.description: Lium is a collaborative AI platform that helps domain experts get reliable answers from messy, massive, multimodal datasets. Connect terabyte size data in any format, ask questions in plain English, generate knowledge artifacts, and turn verified analysis into reusable workflows your team can build on. Lium brings together data across geospatial, energy, space, and other complex domains so work that once required weeks of engineering can happen in a single conversation.

products.name: Onpilot
products.tagline: An AI workforce customized to your business
products.summaryZh: 为您的业务定制的人工智能劳动力
products.descriptionZh: Onpilot 可创建针对您的系统、工作流和流程定制的专业化AI员工。Onpilot能监控运营、识别风险、发现机会、建议行动，并在3000多个集成中实现工作自动化。可部署于Slack、Teams、WhatsApp、您的SaaS或本地环境。
products.description: Onpilot creates specialized AI workers customized to your systems, workflows, and processes. Onpilot monitors operations, identifies risks, uncovers opportunities, recommends actions, and automates work across 3,000+ integrations. Deploy in Slack, Teams, WhatsApp, your SaaS, or on-premises.

products.name: Airbrush Studio
products.tagline: AI-powered photo editor for pro results w/o manual editing
products.summaryZh: AI驱动的照片编辑器，无需手动编辑即可获得专业效果
products.descriptionZh: Airbrush Studio 是一款专为创作者和摄影师打造的AI照片编辑器，旨在无需复杂手动操作即可获得专业级效果。从人像精修、背景清理到图像合成，Airbrush Studio通过AI自动化和任务专属预设简化手动工作流程，助您更快编辑、创作更多。
products.description: Airbrush Studio is an AI-powered photo editor built for creators and photographers who want professional-quality results without the complexity of manual editing. From portrait retouching and background cleanup to image composition, Airbrush Studio simplifies manual workflows with AI automation and task-specific presets, helping you edit faster and create more.

products.name: Cloudskill
products.tagline: Govern the AI skills your team depends on
products.summaryZh: 管理你的团队所依赖的AI技能
products.descriptionZh: 为团队依赖的AI智能体技能建立秩序。Cloudskill将零散的技能文件在数秒内转化为受管理的目录，包含版本控制、按人员配置的访问策略及完整审计日志。每当技能被创建或更新时，所有变更均经过审核、批准与追踪记录。
products.description: Bring order to the AI agent skills your team depends on. Cloudskill turns scattered skill files into a managed catalogue in seconds, complete with version control, per-person access policies, and a full audit log. When skills are created or updated, every change is reviewed, approved, and tracked.

products.name: OwnClip
products.tagline: Native macOS screen recorder with local-first AI privacy
products.summaryZh: 原生macOS屏幕录制工具，本地优先AI隐私保护
products.descriptionZh: 高性能原生macOS屏幕录制工具，专为速度而生。OwnClip采用严格的本地优先架构与设备端AI处理——这意味着你的录制、编辑及智能工作流完全在Mac上完成，确保绝对隐私。
products.description: A high-performance, native macOS screen recorder built for speed. OwnClip features a strict local-first architecture and on-device AI processing—meaning your recordings, edits, and intelligence workflows happen entirely on your Mac with absolute privacy.

products.name: Proxee
products.tagline: Your localhost on your phone, synced.
products.summaryZh: 手机上的本地主机，同步完成。
products.descriptionZh: Proxee 将手机变为本地开发的专用移动端 UI 预览监视器。与浏览器模拟器或 BrowserSync 等工具不同，它是一款原生 macOS 菜单栏应用，具备二维码配对、自动重连、双向同步（导航、滚动、主题）、SSR 安全代理及支持 OAuth 重定向等认证流程。它零配置、框架无关、完全本地运行，并包含原生 iOS 配套应用，实现无缝的真实设备测试工作流。
products.description: Proxee turns your phone into a dedicated mobile UI preview monitor for local development. Unlike browser emulators or tools like BrowserSync, it's a native macOS menu bar app with QR pairing, automatic reconnection, bidirectional sync (navigation, scroll, theme), SSR-safe proxying and support for auth flows including OAuth redirects. It's zero-config, framework-agnostic, 100% local, and includes a native iOS companion for a seamless real-device testing workflow.

products.name: INVO Ride
products.tagline: Book autonomous eVTOL flights over photoreal San Francisco
products.summaryZh: 在逼真的旧金山场景中预订自主eVTOL航班
products.descriptionZh: INVO Ride 是一套面向自动驾驶 eVTOL 的完整出行调度系统，运行于旧金山的逼真 3D 数字孪生之上：六边形空中航道、自主分离机队、兼顾建筑与 FAA 空域感知的路径规划。观看实时演示，无需注册账户。
products.description: INVO Ride is a full ride-hailing stack for autonomous eVTOLs, running on a photoreal 3D twin of San Francisco: hexagonal sky lanes, a self-separating fleet, building- and FAA-airspace-aware routing. Watch the live demo, no account needed.

products.name: Journey Now
products.tagline: Learning copilot for human ambition
products.summaryZh: 人类抱负的学习副驾
products.descriptionZh: Journey Now 能将任何你想学习或掌握的内容，转化为个性化的分步计划——提供每日指导、反思，并让你看到朋友的进度。当你的节奏或目标发生变化时，计划会自动调整，因此进度不会因错过截止日期而停滞。
products.description: Journey Now turns anything you want to learn or master into a personalized, step-by-step plan — with daily guidance, reflection, and a view of how friends are progressing too. As your pace or goals change, the plan adjusts itself, so progress never stalls on a missed deadline.

products.name: Riven
products.tagline: Your Apple Watch knows when you've truly hit muscle failure
products.summaryZh: 你的 Apple Watch 能识别出你真正达到肌肉力竭的时刻。
products.descriptionZh: Riven 将你的 Apple Watch 变成肌肉力竭追踪器。它能自动识别运动、免提计数重复次数，并测量重复速度下降——这是科学验证的真实肌肉疲劳信号——从而告诉你是否真正训练至力竭，还是提前停止了动作。专为增肌和力量训练设计：无需摄像头、杠铃传感器或额外硬件，只需你已有的手表。每组训练后获得 0–100 的力竭评分，让每次训练都能真正促进肌肉生长。
products.description: Riven turns your Apple Watch into a muscle failure tracker. It auto-detects your exercise, counts reps hands-free, and measures rep speed loss — the science-backed signal of true muscle fatigue — to tell you if you actually trained to failure or stopped reps short. Built for hypertrophy and strength training: no camera, no bar sensor, no extra hardware — just the watch you already own. Get a 0–100 failure score after every set, so every workout drives real muscle growth.
